steps.t: There may be footprints on the far side of the lake, and there certainly are avanc. Wynfor wants you to look for footprints on the far side of the lak…
Wynfor is at Tûr Morva, in Tâl Methedras. You have scouted the far shore of the lake for footprints and have also collected the jaws of the avanc that…
